name: Holden Hills Country Club
about: Holden Hills Country Club is an 18-hole facility in Holden, Massachusetts, featuring a golf course designed by William F. Mitchell that plays to 6,088 yards and a par of 71. The venue operates year-round with two indoor Trackman golf simulators and offers a Sports Bar, making it suitable for both outdoor and indoor play. It is well-suited for corporate events, charity fundraisers, and golf leagues, with a banquet facility accommodating up to 200 people.
why_golfers_like_it: Two state-of-the-art Trackman golf simulators available year-round
Affordable season pass membership (Emerald Pass) for great value
Ideal venue for company tournaments and charity fundraisers with professional staff

food_and_drink.notes: Kitchen available; partnered with MCL Custom Caterers for events

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own clubs for simulator sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned; the venue has a Sports Bar and kitchen service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The time required to play 18 holes on the simulator is not specified.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific mention of kid-friendly amenities or policies.
